title: Bridge Essay: Altered Insula Activity during Visceral Interoception in Weight-Restored Patient

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**Altered Insula Activity during Visceral Interoception in Weight-Restored Patients with Anorexia Nervosa.**. Neuropsychopharmacology.. PMID: 26084229. DOI: 10.1038/npp.2015.174. Anorexia nervosa (AN) is adevastating psychiatric illness that is associated with significant morbidity and mortality. Aberrant visceral interoceptive processing within the insula has been hypothesized to be an important mechanism in AN'spathophysiology due to the theoretical link between interoception and emotional experience. We therefore utilized functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) to examine whether altered insula functioning underlies visceral interoception in AN. Fifteen females
